name: Craig Federighi
background: Craig Federighi is Apple’s senior vice president of Software Engineering, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Craig oversees the development of iOS, iPadOS, and macOS. His teams are responsible for delivering the software at the heart of Apple’s products, including the user interface, applications, and frameworks.

company_affiliations.name: Ariba, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chief Technology Officer / Vice President, Internet Services
